title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE PIKIT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL 芒聙聯 DATU DALANDAG ANNEX IN BARANGAY DATU DALANDAG, MUNICIPALITY OF PIKIT, PROVINCE OF NORTH COTABATO FROM THE PIKIT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS DATU DALANDAG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 3482; 109 OG No. 28, 4865 (July 15, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10484, April 16, 2013 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE PIKIT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL 芒聙聯 DATU DALANDAG ANNEX IN BARANGAY DATU DALANDAG, MUNICIPALITY OF PIKIT, PROVINCE OF NORTH COTABATO FROM THE PIKIT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS DATU DALANDAG NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a National High School.

芒聙聯 The Pikit National High School 芒聙聯 Datu Dalandag Annex in Barangay Datu

Dalandag, Municipality of Pikit, Province of North Cotabato is hereby

separated from the Pikit National High School and converted into an

independent national high school to be known as Datu Dalandag National

High School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and Liabilities.

芒聙聯 All

personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Pikit National High

School 芒聙聯 Datu Dalandag Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by

the Datu Dalandag National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

芒聙聯 The Secretary of Education

shall immediately include in the Department芒聙聶s program the

operationalization of the Datu Dalandag National High School, the

initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year芒聙聶s

appropriation of the Pikit National High School 芒聙聯 Datu Dalandag Annex.

Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the

school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

芒聙聯 The Secretary of Education shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity.

芒聙聯 This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was

finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on

September 20, 2012 and January 28, 2013, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 16 2013

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
